verificationNotes.tahoe_2021_2026: 5th gen Tahoe (GMT1YC) confirmed: 6x139.7 bolt pattern, 78.1mm hub bore. Tire sizes 265/65R18, 275/60R20, 275/50R22 verified.
verificationNotes.traverse_2009_2017: 1st gen Traverse: 6x132 bolt pattern, 74.5mm hub bore. ISSUE: Data shows tire sizes don't match - tiresize.com shows 245/70R17 for LS trims, not 255/65R18. Trim list includes RS/Premier/High Country which didn't exist until 2018+.
verificationNotes.traverse_2018_2026: 2nd gen Traverse: 5x120 bolt pattern, 67.1mm hub bore verified. Tire sizes 255/65R18, 255/55R20 confirmed. ISSUE: batch shows 245/60R18 which doesn't match reference.
verificationNotes.trailblazer_2013_2019: CRITICAL: Trailblazer was discontinued in US from 2009-2020. These years only sold in Latin America/international markets with different specs (6x139.7, 100.3mm hub bore). NOT VALID for US market.
verificationNotes.trailblazer_2020: Gen III Trailblazer launched in US as 2021 MY (South Korea/China got 2020 MY). US specs: 5x115 bolt pattern, 70.2mm hub bore (NOT 70.5mm). Batch entry has wrong hub bore.
verificationNotes.trailblazer_2026: CRITICAL: Batch shows 5x100 bolt pattern - INCORRECT. Should be 5x115. Hub bore should be 70.2mm, not 56.6mm.
verificationNotes.trax_2013_2014: First gen Trax (catalog-gap-fill entries): Shows 5x120/67.1mm - INCORRECT. Should be 5x105 bolt pattern, 56.6mm hub bore.
verificationNotes.trax_2015_2018: Trax confirmed: 5x105 bolt pattern, 56.6mm hub bore. Tire sizes 205/70R16, 215/55R18 verified.
verificationNotes.trax_2026: 2024+ Trax redesign: 5x115 bolt pattern (not 5x120 as batch shows), hub bore 70.2-70.3mm (not 67.1mm).
verificationNotes.volt_2010: CRITICAL: Volt first model year was 2011 (sales started Dec 2010). There is no 2010 Volt. Also bolt pattern should be 5x105 per go-parts.com, not 5x120.
